subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Truth! Thy letter from Istanbul arrived. Despite lack of time and intense tribulation, [I send] this brief reply [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق نامه شما از استانبول رسید با وجود عدم فرصت و نهایت محنت جواب مختصر
subcodes.subjects: @mind as intermediary between soul and body, @constitutional revolution in Iran, @past, present and future of Iran
